items.title: Notre Dame Football continues to get a ton of spring hype
items.summary: One of the few joys in life on a Monday morning is knowing that there is Notre Dame Football news and a Triple Option to run. NEVER FEAR… HEATHER DINICH IS HERE It’s the spring football season for the entire country, even if the start and stop dates are different for many schools. It’s a […]

items.title: Halfway through spring football, Notre Dame is putting things together
items.summary: Yes, it’s been a pretty quiet first half of the spring practice season for the Notre Dame Fighting Irish. Despite there being a bit of shock reveal with the injury report at the beginning of spring, the current depth charts (as they’ve been revealed in various ways at practice) are intriguing — but not a […]

items.title: Looking back at when Notre Dame drew a line in the Chestnut Hill turf
items.summary: There are seasons that begin with certainty… and seasons that require a team to discover who they are, one hard-earned moment at a time. The 1998 Notre Dame football team fell into that second category. Under Head Coach Bob Davie, the Irish were navigating the early stages of a new era, learning—sometimes the hard way—that […]
